proposal_summary: Registers the 'on.eth' ENS name to the ENS DAO wallet and sets its resolver to an on-chain registry-resolver contract, updating previous proposal EP 6.34 to account for ownership model changes in the Base Registrar.

disclosed_entities.name: BaseRegistrarImplementation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Registering the name `on.eth` to the DAO wallet... To: 0x57f1887a8BF19b14fC0dF6Fd9B2acc9Af147eA85

disclosed_entities.name: ENS Registry (Implied)
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Setting the deployed `ChainResolver` as the resolver for on.eth... To: 0x00000000000C2E074eC69A0dFb2997BA6C7d2e1e

claimed_actions.raw_action: Adding the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract through the RegistrarSecurityController.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Gives the DAO wallet controller rights to register the name
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 1. Adding the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract through the RegistrarSecurityController.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Registering the name `on.eth` to the DAO wallet.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Assigns ownership of on.eth to the DAO wallet
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 2. Registering the name `on.eth` to the DAO wallet.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Setting the deployed `ChainResolver` as the resolver for on.eth
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Updates the resolver for on.eth to the new ChainResolver
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 3. Setting the deployed `ChainResolver` as the resolver for on.eth

claimed_actions.raw_action: Removing the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract through the RegistrarSecurityController.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Revokes controller rights from the DAO wallet
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 4. Removing the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation` smart contract through the RegistrarSecurityController.

claimed_complexity.reason: Involves temporarily taking controller privileges via another contract, making modifications, and then explicitly dropping privileges.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Adding the DAO wallet as a controller on the `BaseRegistrarImplementation`... Removing the DAO wallet as a controller

limitations: Function names are not explicitly mentioned in the text, only calldata is provided.
